_comment: Thunder synthesis target statistics derived from real CC0/PD recordings. Measured 2026-07-14.

far_rumble.note: Recorded Finland 2007; predominantly sub-bass, very long tail

far_rumble._description: Target for far/distant thunder (distance_km >= 5.0). Match rumble type.

octave_bands_relative_dB_vs_150_4800Hz_t._note: These are relative to 150-4800Hz sub-band total (not used in VT2.5 gate - see below)

octave_bands_relative_dB_vs_total._note: These are relative to ALL-FREQ total power. Used in VT2.5 gate (fairer for sub-bass-dominant signals).

gate_targets.note: Synth need not exactly match 2.3% mid; gate checks octave shape in 150-4kHz

near_crack._description: Target for near/close thunder (distance_km <= 3.0). Match crack type.

octave_bands_relative_dB_vs_150_4800Hz_t._note: These are relative to 150-4800Hz sub-band total (not used in VT2.5 gate - see below)

octave_bands_relative_dB_vs_total._note: These are relative to ALL-FREQ total power. VT2.5 only uses 300-600Hz band (index 1) for near thunder - other bands unreliable due to SFX bandlimiting.

gate_targets.note: Near thunder: mid band dominant; crack gives fast transient
